summary: Redesigned the index.html homepage with a Neo-brutalist functional aesthetic based on webp.baby, removing the hero section for direct tool access.

changes.details: Replaced the previous neumorphic design in index.html with a clean minimalist design. Updated layout to use a modern grid for test cards, elegant Inter typography, and light gray subtle borders.
changes.reason: User requested a sleeker, minimalist design ('极简风格') as the old design felt clunky.

changes.details: Completely removed the Hero section. Refactored the UI to a Neo-brutalist style inspired by webp.baby (heavy black borders, stark solid shadows: 4px 4px 0 #000, bold typography). Users can now see and click tests immediately upon page load without scrolling.
changes.reason: User requested the tests be visible immediately on the first screen without a hero area, matching the functional brutalist style of webp.baby.

changes.details: Translated the content of the minimalist mockup into Chinese (except for the 'M-profile Lab' title). Maintained SEO tags.
changes.reason: User specifically requested Chinese language implementation.

steps: Wrote raw HTML/CSS directly to index.html without introducing external UI libraries to respect the project's dependency rules.
Ensured mobile responsiveness with media queries adjusting padding and hiding non-essential nav links.
